creator: user10508@gmail.com
text:
REDSHIFT - Failed to start adjustment method randr - 

also filed, 01.28.2012, at https://bugs.launchpad.net/redshift/+bug/923120bug

 

redshift version 1.7
os pcbsd-9 freebsd-9 release

command ---- redshift -l 40.9:73.8 -t 5500:4500 -v

results:

Location: 40.900002, 73.800003
Brightness: 1.00
Gamma: 1.000, 1.000, 1.000
Gamma ramp size too small: 0
Failed to start adjustment method randr.
Trying next method...
No more methods to try.

hardware:

ASUS notebook intel i5 using integrated graphics adapter

win7 and opensuse 11.4 also on hard drive

redshift on opensuse - works properly

on bsd:

tested as package

recompiled from ports by make install

results same

 command xrandr -q --verbose

results

xrandr: Failed to get size of gamma for output default
Screen 0: minimum 1366 x 768, current 1368 x 768, maximum 1368 x 768
default connected 1368x768+0+0 (0x109) normal (normal) 0mm x 0mm
 Identifier: 0x107
 Timestamp: 43604
 Subpixel: horizontal rgb
 Clones:
 CRTC: 0
 CRTCs: 0
 Transform: 1.000000 0.000000 0.000000
             0.000000 1.000000 0.000000
             0.000000 0.000000 1.000000
            filter:
  1366x768 (0x108) 0.0MHz
        h: width 1366 start 0 end 0 total 1366 skew 0 clock 0.0KHz
        v: height 768 start 0 end 0 total 768 clock 0.0Hz
  1368x768 (0x109) 0.0MHz *current
        h: width 1368 start 0 end 0 total 1368 skew 0 clock 0.0KHz
        v: height 768 start 0 end 0 total 768 clock 0.0Hz

How-To-Repeat: run redshift on intel core i5, freebsd 9, to change color temperature using command as above in bug report
